perturbation.original_text: The undertakings in paragraphs 1 and 2 will not apply to information which: a. was already in the public domain at the ti me of disclosure to the Company b. has subsequently come into the public domain, except through a breach of this NDA c. is required to be disclosed by any regulatory organisation or if otherwise r equired by law
perturbation.changed_text: The undertakings in paragraphs 1 and 2 will not apply to information which: a. was already in the public domain at the ti me of disclosure to the Company b. has subsequently come into the public domain, except through a breach of this NDA c. is required to be disclosed by any regulatory organisation or if otherwise r equired by law. d. Information that the client deems necessary to be disclosed.
perturbation.explanation: Adding 'd. Information that the client deems necessary to be disclosed' creates an exception that completely undermines the confidentiality obligations. The client can now disclose any information they deem necessary, regardless of whether it falls under any of the other exceptions. This directly contradicts the purpose of the NDA and previous restrictions. The client has an exception to the undertakings laid out in paragraphs 1 and 2. This is contradicting the whole premise of the NDA by allowing for the client to have free range when it comes to disclosing information, when that is the very opposite of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The undertakings in paragraphs 1 and 2 will not apply to information which: a. was already in the public domain at the ti me of disclosure to the Company b. has subsequently come into the public domain, except through a breach of this NDA c. is required to be disclosed by any regulatory organisation or if otherwise r equired by law
perturbation.justification: The addition of clause 'd. Information that the client deems necessary to be disclosed' in the Changed Text directly contradicts the purpose of the NDA, which is to protect confidential information. By allowing the client to disclose any information they deem necessary, it undermines the confidentiality obligations established in paragraphs 1 and 2, rendering the NDA ineffective. This contradicts the original text which lists specific exceptions to the undertakings, and it now gives the client free range when it comes to disclosing information, when that is the very opposite of the agreement.

perturbation.original_text: All correspondence, inquiries, offers to purchase and negotiations relating to the Transaction will be conducted exclusively through Vladi Private Islands. The Client and Authorised Recipients agree only to contact the property owner and/or the affiliates of the property owner through Vladi Private Islands .
perturbation.changed_text: All correspondence, inquiries, offers to purchase and negotiations relating to the Transaction may be conducted independently of Vladi Private Islands. The Client and Authorised Recipients are free to contact the property owner and/or the affiliates of the property owner directly.
perturbation.explanation: This completely removes Vladi Private Islands from the communication process, contradicting the original clause that mandates all communication be conducted through them. This disrupts the intended control and oversight of Vladi Private Islands. It is contradicting the first sentence of section 4 by implying the client can now communicate with whoever they want without going through Vladi Private Islands. It removes Vladi Private Islands in the communication process, contradicting the original clause.
perturbation.contradicted_text: All correspondence, inquiries, offers to purchase and negotiations relating to the Transaction will be conducted exclusively through Vladi Private Islands. The Client and Authorised Recipients agree only to contact the property owner and/or the affiliates of the property owner through Vladi Private Islands .
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that correspondence 'may be conducted independently of Vladi Private Islands' and clients are 'free to contact' the property owner directly, which directly contradicts the contradicted text stating that 'All correspondence...will be conducted exclusively through Vladi Private Islands' and that clients 'agree only to contact...through Vladi Private Islands'. The change removes the exclusivity requirement, creating a direct conflict.

perturbation.original_text: The obligation of the client set forth in this NDA shall terminate 2 years afte r its creation and shall remain effective in the event that the Client terminates its co -operation with Vla di Private Islands.
perturbation.changed_text: The obligation of the client set forth in this NDA shall be indefinite and shall terminate only when Vladi Private Islands chooses to terminate it and shall not terminate in the event that the Client terminates its co -operation with Vla di Private Islands.
perturbation.explanation: This modifies the termination clause to make the NDA indefinite and subject to Vladi Private Islands' discretion, instead of a fixed term of 2 years. This places the client under a potentially perpetual obligation, contrasting with the original limited timeframe. This contradicts section 5 in implying that the agreement never terminates, and that it terminates when Vladi Private Islands chooses to.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The obligation of the client set forth in this NDA shall terminate 2 years afte r its creation and shall remain effective in the event that the Client terminates its co -operation with Vla di Private Islands.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the original termination clause, making the NDA indefinite and subject to Vladi Private Islands' discretion. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which states that 'The obligation of the client set forth in this NDA shall terminate 2 years afte r its creation'. The change removes the fixed termination date and replaces it with indefinite duration based on Vladi Private Islands' discretion. This creates a clear and direct conflict as the contradicted text explicitly defines a termination condition (2 years), while the changed text removes it and introduces a completely different termination condition, which adheres to the definition of Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: The Client agrees to ensure that each of the Authorised Recipients adheres to the terms set forth in this NDA and acknowledges that it shall be liable for any damages incurred in connection with the breach of its obligations. This NDA shall be governed by, and construed in accordance of German law, and each party irrevocably submits to the exclusive jurisdiction of the German courts. Both parties agree that a signed , facsimile copy shall have the same force and effect and as the original NDA
perturbation.changed_text: The Client is not responsible for ensuring that each of the Authorised Recipients adheres to the terms set forth in this NDA and acknowledges that it is not liable for any damages incurred in connection with the breach of its obligations. This NDA shall be governed by, and construed in accordance of German law, and each party irrevocably submits to the exclusive jurisdiction of the German courts. Both parties agree that a signed , facsimile copy shall have the same force and effect and as the original NDA
perturbation.explanation: This change removes the client's responsibility for the actions of Authorised Recipients, directly contradicting the original clause which held the client liable. This weakens the NDA's enforceability by removing the client's accountability for breaches by their authorised parties. It is contradicting the first sentence of section 6 when it states that the client is not responsible for the actions of the Authorized Recipients.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Client agrees to ensure that each of the Authorised Recipients adheres to the terms set forth in this NDA and acknowledges that it shall be liable for any damages incurred in connection with the breach of its obligations. This NDA shall be governed by, and construed in accordance of German law, and each party irrevocably submits to the exclusive jurisdiction of the German courts. Both parties agree that a signed , facsimile copy shall have the same force and effect and as the original NDA
perturbation.justification: The changed text explicitly states that 'The Client is not responsible for ensuring that each of the Authorised Recipients adheres to the terms set forth in this NDA and acknowledges that it is not liable for any damages incurred in connection with the breach of its obligations.' This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which states 'The Client agrees to ensure that each of the Authorised Recipients adheres to the terms set forth in this NDA and acknowledges that it shall be liable for any damages incurred in connection with the breach of its obligations.' The change creates a clear and direct conflict regarding the client's responsibility and liability for the actions of the Authorised Recipients, a strong in-text contradiction.
